calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jul-31-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Name Change of a minor.

Dept. 514, Judge: Paul H. Alvarado, Clerk: S.Vantree, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840

Petitioners Zhian Lu and Shao Hong Lian, father and mother of minor present. Minor Dongwen Lu present and acts as Cantonese interpreter for her parents.
Petitioners are sworn and examined.
Zhian Lu, father, signs petition in open court.
Proof of Publication on file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.
The court grants the petition for Change of Name of minor from Dongwen Lu to Dayna Dongwen Lu.

Decree Changing Name signed in open court.
